{{Quote|I was a slave to a cruel master, Omeesh the Hutt.|[[Yuthura Ban]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Omeesh''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who lived on [[Sleheyron/Legends|Sleheyron]] at some point prior to the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He enjoyed [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] his [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. He was eventually murdered by one of them, a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|girl]] named [[Yuthura Ban]], who stabbed him in his bedchamber.
